t_ch: 想来蒙托尔星系的家族一定脱不了干系。
t_en: My guess is that The Family from the Montour System must be involved.

t_ch: 可惜数百年过去，此事早已无从查证。匹诺康尼毕竟只是一片小小的属地，家主们贵为管理者，也无权踏足「同谐」圣地，探问神主真意。
t_en: Unfortunately, too much time has passed to verify that. Penacony is just a small territory, and even the family heads with their authority cannot enter the sacred site of the Harmony and inquire about the true will of the Great One.

t_ch: 甚至最坏的情况，如果希佩对此也听之任之，「以强援弱」又从何谈起？
t_en: In the worst-case scenario, if Xipe turned a blind eye, how could "the strong defending the weak" hold up?

t_ch: 瓦尔特先生，我只想告诉您一件事：「同谐」绝不止有一种面相，祂可以是星穹列车最坚实的盟友，也可以是最可怕的敌人。
t_en: Mr. Yang, I just want to tell you this: The Harmony has more than one side. THEY can be the most steadfast ally of the Astral Express or the most fearsome enemy.

t_ch: 谢谢你的坦诚。列车组尽力促成如今的局面，也是出于相同的顾虑。
t_en: Thank you for being honest with me. The efforts of the Crew on Penacony were driven by the same concern.

t_ch: 经此一役，盛会之星的形势将由「同谐」、「存护」彼此制衡，共同监管，而在「开拓」的助力下，会有更多势力来到这里，匹诺康尼会逐步变为银河中的公共地带。
t_en: After all this, the Harmony and the Preservation will keep the situation on the Planet of Festivities in balance. With the momentum from the Trailblaze, more forces will arrive, and Penacony will become a public space in the Cosmos.

t_ch: 「自由」——这是无名客能给出的唯一答案，很高兴匹诺康尼正需要它。
t_en: Freedom is the only answer the Nameless can offer. I'm glad that Penacony needs it.

t_ch: 即使动因不同，各位也同样走在济世安民的路上，且比我走得更远。
t_en: You and I both strive for a peaceful society, even if our reasons are different, and you've gone even further than I have.

t_ch: 若非命途使然，也许你我不至于走向对立的结局。
t_en: If not for our Paths, perhaps you and I wouldn't be in opposition.

t_ch: 不必妄自菲薄，我们并非水火不容的关系。否则，你也不会在梦主面前对我手下留情。
t_en: Don't sell yourself short. We're not fundamentally opposed. Otherwise, you wouldn't have shown me mercy in front of the Dreammaster.

t_ch: 这段同行算是我个人的回礼，无论如何——
t_en: This shared journey is my way of repaying you. After all—

t_ch: 你也是我「开拓」的对象之一。
t_en: You are one of my Trailblazing goals.

t_ch: 关于这点，您同样给了我很多启发。人类才是万物的尺度，没有人是唯一的救世主。
t_en: About that, you've given me many insights as well. Humans are the measure of everything, and no one is the sole savior.

t_ch: 创造乐园仍是我毕生的夙愿，但在今后的旅程中，我必须一砖一瓦地构建它。所以，我有一个难以启齿的请求……
t_en: Creating a paradise remains one of my lifelong ambitions. As I move forward, I realize I must build it brick by brick. Therefore, I have a request that I hope you'll consider...

t_ch: 我固然不具备「开拓」的意志，也无法成为一位真正的无名客。
t_en: While I lack the will to Trailblaze, nor can I become a true Nameless...

t_ch: 但我敬佩各位的信念，比起苦修，或许我更需要的是求学。
t_en: I admire your convictions. Perhaps, what I need, more than asceticism, is knowledge.

t_ch: 所以，在离开匹诺康尼后，您能否允许我……
t_en: Therefore, after leaving Penacony, would you consider letting me...

t_ch: 登上星穹列车，暂且与各位同行？
t_en: Come aboard the Astral Express and travel with you for now?

t_ch: 坠亡本是飞翔的别名。
t_en: Falling is just another name for flying.

t_ch: 正因如此，我庆幸于自身的折翼。
t_en: That's why I rejoice at my broken wings.

t_ch: 到人间去，为了看那尘世。
t_en: Step into the mortal world to see how it truly is.

t_ch: 而后如人般生，如人般死。
t_en: Then, be born as a human and die as one.

t_ch: 一段时间后……
t_en: Some time later...

t_ch: 这就是他前来这里的原因。
t_en: So, this is why I brought him here.

t_ch: 星期日先生希望能与列车同行。显然，我不该自行决定此事。
t_en: Mr. Sunday wants to join us on the Express. Of course, I can't make that decision alone.

t_ch: 但如果你不支持，就不会带他回来。
t_en: But if you didn't support this idea, you wouldn't have brought him back.

t_ch: 瓦尔特，我相信你的判断。只要人愿意共赴前程，列车的车门理应为他敞开。
t_en: Welt, I trust your judgment. If someone is willing to join us on our journey, the Express will be open to them.

t_ch: 不过这次情况特殊，在做出决定前，{NICKNAME}，我想先听听你的意见。
t_en: But this time is a bit different. Before making any decision, {NICKNAME}, I want to hear what you think.

t_ch: 我吗？
t_en: Me?

t_ch: 嗯，在这场交锋中，你和他是最直接的对手。你的想法尤为重要。
t_en: In this battle, you were the one who directly confronted him. Your opinion holds the most weight.

t_ch: 我想听大家的意见。
t_en: I want to hear everyone's opinion.

t_ch: 可是在这场交锋中，你和他是最直接的对手。你的想法尤为重要。
t_en: But in this battle, you were the one who directly confronted him. Your opinion holds the most weight.

t_ch: 没什么好说的。
t_en: I don't have anything to say.

t_ch: 是么？可你脸上明明写着许多心思啊，都说出来吧，你的想法尤为重要。
t_en: Oh, really? But your face tells me otherwise. Come on, spill it. Your opinion holds the most weight.

t_ch: 从过去的对手那里，我才能习得最宝贵的经验。请畅所欲言。
t_en: I learn the most valuable lessons from my past opponents. Please say whatever's on your mind.

t_ch: 你是个高尚的人。
t_en: You are a noble person.

t_ch: 无论如何，我认可你是个高尚的人。你心中常怀怜悯，即使立场相对，我也无法否认这点。
t_en: You're a noble person. I can't deny that you always have compassion in your heart, even though we may view things differently.

t_ch: 你总是想要控制一切。
t_en: You always want to be in control.

t_ch: 你是个完美主义者，总想控制一切，包括自己。但离开匹诺康尼后，前方就只剩下「未知」了，换种生活方式，对大家都好。
t_en: You're a perfectionist, always trying to control everything — even when it comes to yourself. Although, we're going to be traveling further into the unknown once we leave Penacony. I guess a change of pace could do everyone some good.

t_ch: 你辜负了许多人的信任。
t_en: You've disappointed many people.

t_ch: 你知道我要说什么，你辜负了许多人的信任，甚至包括最重要的家人。别忘记这件事。
t_en: You know what I'm going to say. Tons of people trusted you, but you let them all down — even your closest family. Don't you forget that.

t_ch: 我认可你的理念。
t_en: I agree with what you stand for.

t_ch: 至于你的理想，我相信它能以另一种更正确的形式实现。七休日…虽然只是个比喻，但我很期待那一天。
t_en: I believe there is a way — a better way — to achieve your ideal. Seven rest days may be just a metaphor... But I look forward to the day when it comes true.

t_ch: 别对人类太悲观。
t_en: Have some hope in humanity.

t_ch: 也许你对人性的看法是悲观的，但「开拓」不一样，我们踏上这条路，首先得学会「相信」。你也得做到。
t_en: Maybe you're too pessimistic about humanity, but the Trailblaze isn't like that. We had to learn to have faith before embarking on this path. You must do the same.

t_ch: 你的梦想不切实际。
t_en: You have an unrealistic ideal.

t_ch: 有梦想是件好事，但飞得太高，脱离了实际，就不会有好结果。我无法接受你为了一个缥缈的愿望，就把所有人拉进自己的世界里。
t_en: Ideals are good to have, but nothing good comes from getting carried away in fantasies. I can never agree with how you dragged everyone into that world of yours just to fulfill an illusory dream.

t_ch: 我们可以成为朋友。
t_en: We can be friends.

t_ch: 总之，世事无常，昨天的敌人也可以是今天的朋友……
t_en: Nothing is for certain, anyway. An enemy yesterday may be a friend today.

t_ch: 你是位可敬的对手。
t_en: You're a worthy adversary.

t_ch: 总之，在我并不漫长的「开拓」中，你称得上是一位令人难忘的对手……
t_en: Anyhow, you've been an unforgettable adversary to me, even though I haven't been trailblazing for long...

t_ch: 我的看法和杨叔不同…
t_en: I don't agree with Mr. Yang...

t_ch: 总之，我的观点和杨叔不同……
t_en: In any case, I'm gonna have to disagree with Mr. Yang...

t_ch: 他可以加入星穹列车。
t_en: He can join the Astral Express Crew.

t_ch: 欢迎加入星穹列车。
t_en: Welcome aboard the Astral Express.

t_ch: 我也赞同。
t_en: I second that.

t_ch: 都说洗白弱三分，应该没问题吧！
t_en: Well, you did get nerfed after turning into a good guy... So, I guess I'm okay, too!

t_ch: 谢谢各位包容，感激不尽。
t_en: Thank you all for your forgiveness.

t_ch: 也许某一天，我会在旅途中找到所寻的答案，离开这里。
t_en: Perhaps I'll find the answer I'm looking for on this journey. And when that day comes, it'll be farewell.

t_ch: 但在那之前，我定会履行同伴的职责，尽心尽力。
t_en: Until then, rest assured that I will do my best to fulfill my duty as your companion.

t_ch: 我总算不是老幺了。
t_en: Finally, I'm no longer the newbie.

t_ch: 来吧，这样你就是新的老幺了。
t_en: Come on, you're taking over as newbie.

t_ch: 他还没正式加入啦！只是搭个车，没人能撼动你的地位。
t_en: He's just traveling with us, not an actual member of the Express crew yet! Your newbie status is untouchable.

t_ch: 我也没意见。
t_en: I'm fine with that.

t_ch: 谢谢各位包容，感激不尽。
t_en: Thank you all for your forgiveness.

t_ch: 也许某一天，我会在旅途中找到所寻的答案，离开这里。
t_en: Perhaps I'll find the answer I'm looking for on this journey. And when that day comes, it'll be farewell.

t_ch: 但在那之前，我定会履行同伴的职责，尽心尽力。
t_en: Until then, rest assured that I will do my best to fulfill my duty as your companion.

t_ch: 还是听听大家的意见。
t_en: Maybe we should hear everyone else's opinion.

t_ch: 我没有别的话想说了，交给大家定夺吧。
t_en: I have nothing more to add. I'll let you all decide, then.

t_ch: 我也没意见。
t_en: I'm fine with that.

t_ch: 都说洗白弱三分，应该没问题吧！
t_en: Well, you did get nerfed after turning into a good guy... So, I guess I'm okay, too!

t_ch: 谢谢各位包容，感激不尽。
t_en: Thank you all for your forgiveness.

t_ch: 也许某一天，我会在旅途中找到所寻的答案，离开这里。
t_en: Perhaps I'll find the answer I'm looking for on this journey. And when that day comes, it'll be farewell.

t_ch: 但在那之前，我同样会履行乘客的职责，尽心尽力。
t_en: Until then, I will do my best to fulfill my duty as a passenger.

t_ch: 我会一直盯着你的。
t_en: I'll have my eye on you at all times.

t_ch: 做好准备，我会一直盯着你。
t_en: You should know that I'll be watching your every move.

t_ch: 我也会帮忙。
t_en: I'll help you with that.

t_ch: 应该没问题吧，都说洗白弱三分嘛。
t_en: I guess it shouldn't be a problem. After all, he did get nerfed after turning into a good guy.

t_ch: 谢谢各位包容，感激不尽。
t_en: Thank you all for your forgiveness.

t_ch: 也许某一天，我会在旅途中找到所寻的答案，离开这里。
t_en: Perhaps I'll find the answer I'm looking for on this journey. And when that day comes, it'll be farewell.

t_ch: 但在那之前，我同样会履行乘客的职责，尽心尽力。
t_en: Until then, I will do my best to fulfill my duty as a passenger.

t_ch: 无论如何，我无法接受。
t_en: I won't accept this, no matter what is said.

t_ch: 我没法欺骗自己，也许我们更适合做萍水相逢的过客，而不是同道。
t_en: I won't pretend I'm okay with it. You can be our passenger, but you're not joining us.

t_ch: 这也是理所当然。既然如此，我会在列车离开阿斯德纳后，自行寻找一处合适的站点离去，不给各位添麻烦。
t_en: Of course, you have every reason to feel that way. In that case, I won't inconvenience you all any more than necessary. I'll find a stop to disembark at once the Express departs Asdana.

t_ch: 而在那之前，我同样会履行乘客的职责，愿尽绵薄之力。
t_en: Until then, rest assured that I will behave as expected of a passenger.

t_ch: 呃…看来也没办法了。
t_en: Uh... I guess that'll have to do, then.

t_ch: 这期间，我会看好他的。
t_en: I'll keep a close eye on him in the meantime.

t_ch: …看来是有结论了呢。
t_en: ...Looks like we've come to a decision.

t_ch: 稍后，也把这件事告诉列车长吧。
t_en: Remember to keep the conductor in the loop, too.

t_ch: 既然我们在匹诺康尼的事了结了，按原计划，差不多该准备跃迁了？
t_en: Now that our business on Penacony is settled, it's about time we get back on track and prepare for our next warp jump?

t_ch: 嗯，但在出发前，我还想尝试联络下黑塔女士。此前请她帮忙调查翁法罗斯，即便没有结果，也不能不打招呼就一走了之。
t_en: Yeah, but let me try contacting Madam Herta again before we set off. She helped us look into Amphoreus, even though nothing new came up... I should at least let her know we're leaving.

t_ch: 「尝试」是什么意思？
t_en: "Try"?

t_ch: 可能是星际网络出了点问题，我刚才联络了几次空间站，都没有回应。
t_en: I tried contacting the space station several times, but I never got any response. Maybe there's a problem with the Interastral Network.

t_ch: 先别担心，那毕竟是天才的地盘，反物质军团都拿它没办法……
t_en: It shouldn't be anything to worry about. What could happen on the geniuses' home turf? Even the Antimatter Legion wouldn't stand a chance...

t_ch: 也许只是黑塔女士又有了什么动作吧。
t_en: For all we know, Madam Herta could be making a move again.

t_ch: 不，还差那么一点。
t_en: No, we're still not quite there.

t_ch: 同一时间，{TEXTJOIN#87}
t_en: Meanwhile, {TEXTJOIN#87}

t_ch: 此后一时无言。「启程」往往与「离别」难分难解，但她们是如此幸运，不必在二者之间犹疑。
t_en: A moment of silence lingers after that. "Departure" is often indistinguishable from "Parting," yet they are fortunate enough not to have to waver between the two.

t_ch: 但幸运似乎绝不会垂青于每一个人——
t_en: But luck never seems to favor everyone...

t_ch: 你尝试投入了一些东西，但它完全没有任何反应——小垃圾桶真有个性，成功引起了你的注意力。
t_en: You attempt to insert some things, but no reaction is observed — This little trashcan has quite the personality, successfully grabbing your attention.

t_ch: 你将好看的垃圾放入了桶内以示重视，一转眼，桶中多出了更多好看的垃圾——真是聚宝盆原理的一种错误应用。
t_en: You insert Pleasant-Looking Trash into the bin as a sign of consideration, and in the blink of an eye, more Pleasant-Looking Trashes emerge — what an inappropriate application of the Horn of Plenty concept.

t_ch: 你放入了更多好看的垃圾，垃圾桶很高兴，向你默默致意，离开前，你莫名感到很有尊严。
t_en: You insert more Pleasant-Looking Trash. The trashcan is overjoyed and silently pays its respects to you. Before you leave, you suddenly feel a sense of dignity.

t_ch: 此刻，人们还没料想到这个假期将会多么「充实」，他们将共同见证仙舟的演武盛事，甚至忙里偷闲，完成了与一位天才的约定——
t_en: At this moment, people still haven't expected this vacation to be so fulfilling. They will witness the grand Xianzhou wardance and, during this moment of leisure, also complete arts promise made by a genius...

t_ch: 而他们将会再度相见的人…除了朋友，也有敌手。
t_en: And those they will meet again... include not only friends, but also foes.

t_ch: 只一眨眼的工夫，面前的冰激凌就进了万维克的肚子。
t_en: In the blink of an eye, the ice cream vanished into Wonweek's stomach.

t_ch: 至此，由调律意外揭示的往事再度沉睡，黯淡下去……
t_en: At this point, past events revealed by the tuning recede to the darkness once more...

t_ch: 如此前那样，一张字条被小心地放在了这块拼图旁边，似是有人始终领先一步——
t_en: Just as before, a note was placed carefully next to the puzzle, like someone got here a step earlier...

t_ch: …{NICKNAME}？三月七小姐在到处找你。
t_en: ...{NICKNAME}? Miss March 7th is looking for you everywhere.

t_ch: 又要值日了？
t_en: On duty again?

t_ch: 应该是要洗照片……
t_en: I think she wants to develop photos...

t_ch: 我也不知内情，不过，她告诉我：如果见到你，提醒你看看短信。
t_en: I don't know the details either, but she told me that if I see you, I should remind you to check your messages.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>她还说：一些你遗漏的东西，事实上极为重要。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>She also said that some things you missed are actually extremely important.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>她还说：一些你遗漏的东西，事实上极为重要。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>She also said that some things you missed are actually extremely important.</color>

t_ch: …嘿嘿，当然喜欢啦，花姐老是猜中我的心思。
t_en: ...Hehe, of course I like it! Big Sis Dahlia always knows what's on my mind.

t_ch: 如此说来，下一趟「开拓」之旅，我们又能同行了？
t_en: So that means we'll be companions again on the next Trailblaze mission?

t_ch: 当然，我特意加快了脚步呢。可惜，还是错过了一些事。
t_en: Of course. I deliberately picked up my pace for that. Though sadly, I still missed out on some things.

t_ch: 嗯，如果你也参与了翁法罗斯之行，许多事会变得简单。
t_en: Indeed. Had you joined the Amphorean expedition, it would've made a lot of things easier.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}——你可算来了，花姐都念叨了你好几次了！
t_en: {NICKNAME}! You're finally here! Big Sis Dahlia has been asking about you nonstop!

t_ch: 是我没见过的老前辈？
t_en: Is this a senior member I haven't met before?

t_ch: 喂喂！不要命啦！「老」是花姐的禁忌词！
t_en: Whoa whoa! Have you gone mad? Did you forget that we should never mention words like "old" or "senior" in front of Big Sis Dahlia?

t_ch: 你是……
t_en: ...And you are?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}最近总爱开这种玩笑。
t_en: {NICKNAME}'s just been on a roll with these kinds of jokes lately.

t_ch: 没关系，忘记了也不奇怪。喜新厌旧的习惯，说不准…{F#她}{M#他}就是从我这里学去的呢。
t_en: No worries. It's okay if {F#s}he forgot. {M#He's}{F#She's} always preferred the latest new thing... Maybe {F#s}he picked up that bad habit from me.

t_ch: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}——现在，回想起什么了吗？
t_en: Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. Now, does anything ring a bell?

t_ch: <color=#6f7cda><s>不对劲…你做了什么？</s></color>
t_en: <color=#6f7cda><s>Something's not right... What did you do?</s></color>

t_ch: 嗯？怎么啦？
t_en: Hm? What's wrong?

t_ch: <color=#6f7cda><s>泯灭帮…永火官邸？</s></color>
t_en: <color=#6f7cda><s>The Annihilation Gang... Ever-Flame Mansion?</s></color>

t_ch: 可是……
t_en: But...

t_ch: 可是什么？莫非…你*忘记*了什么？
t_en: "But" what? Don't tell me... you forgot something?

t_ch: 我…没见过你…
t_en: I... haven't seen you before...

t_ch: 你究竟是谁？
t_en: Who exactly are you?

t_ch: 你到底怎么啦，在翁法罗斯留下后遗症了不成？连花姐都忘了？
t_en: What's gotten into you? Did Amphoreus give you amnesia? How could you forget about Big Sis Dahlia?

t_ch: 在空间站的时候，是她帮你压制了暴走的星核哎。
t_en: She was the one who helped you suppress the rampaging Stellaron back at the space station.

t_ch: 明明是杨叔…
t_en: No. It was Mr. Yang...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}…那一站，我没有离开列车。
t_en: {NICKNAME}... I didn't leave the Express at that stop.

t_ch: 就是，你到底怎么啦？
t_en: Exactly! What's wrong with you?

t_ch: 还有别的吗？
t_en: Anything else she did?

t_ch: 还有还有，第一次去仙舟，是花姐给了那绝灭大君最后一击，这么大的事情你总不会忘吧？
t_en: Totally! It was Big Sis Dahlia who dealt the final blow to that Lord Ravager the first time we went to the Xianzhou. You haven't forgotten something that big, have you?

t_ch: 就因为这个，花姐才不得不回忆庭养伤，没能和我们一起去匹诺康尼。
t_en: That was why Big Sis Dahlia had to go back to the Garden to recover and couldn't join us in Penacony.

t_ch: 没错，大丽花女士同我们「开拓」至今。她是最具野心，也最优秀的无名客。
t_en: Correct. Lady Dahlia has been "trailblazing" with us for a while now. She's the most ambitious and talented of the Nameless.

t_ch: 哪用得着我们提醒，{NICKNAME}和大丽花同行的时间，比任何人都要多。
t_en: No need for reminders from us. {NICKNAME} has spent more time with The Dahlia than anyone else.

t_ch: 不妨让她给你诊断一下——与「记忆」相关的问题，她本就是列车上最拿手的那一位。
t_en: Why don't you let her diagnose you? She's the Express's resident expert when it comes to matters regarding "memories."

t_ch: 事不宜迟，欢迎派对稍晚再说吧。大丽花女士，有劳了。
t_en: This is a pressing concern. We'll save the welcome party for later. Lady Dahlia, if you would.

t_ch: 哎呀——别愣着啦，快来，以前不是也发生过嘛，交给花姐吧，没问题的。
t_en: Oh come on! Don't just stand there! Hurry up and get over here. It's not like this hasn't happened before. Leave it to Big Sis Dahlia. It'll be fine!

t_ch: 嗯，如果是「记忆」出了问题，最好别耽误时间。
t_en: I concur. If there's an issue with "memories," then we'd better not waste any time.

t_ch: 你们怎么……
t_en: Why are you all...

t_ch: 好的，来了。
t_en: Alright. Coming!

t_ch: 好的，来了。
t_en: Alright. Coming!

t_ch: 好的，来了。
t_en: Alright. Coming!

t_ch: 好的，来了。
t_en: Alright. Coming!

t_ch: 好的，来了。
t_en: Alright. Coming!
(No. This isn't right...)

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>听我说。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Listen.</color>

t_ch: 你会经历背叛，陷入迷茫，需要…答案。
t_en: You'll face betrayal, lose your way... and seek answers.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>你是为了银河的愿望而启程的。在以你为主角的故事里，宇宙会逃离「终末」的命运。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>It was a wish of the cosmos that set you in motion. And in the tale where you are the protagonist, the stars themselves will defy the destiny of "Finality."</color>

t_ch: 等等——
t_en: Hang on...

t_ch: 你到底是谁？
t_en: Who exactly are you?

t_ch: 你对他们做了什么？
t_en: What did you do to them?

t_ch: 还真是…与众不同。你的「记忆」有点棘手呢。是谁在保护它们吗？
t_en: Well, this is... quite unusual. Your "memories" are quite tricky. Is someone protecting those memories?

t_ch: 那就再试一次吧。
t_en: Let's try again then.

t_ch: 命运有时也和记忆类似。正因它如迷宫一般曲折，对于有缘人，银河的尺度也称不上多么广大。
t_en: Destiny is much like memory. Since it twists and turns like a maze, even the vastness of the cosmos isn't too great for those fated to meet.

t_ch: 或许，我们很快就会再度相逢。
t_en: Perhaps we'll meet again soon.

t_ch: 啊，{NICKNAME}——你可算来了！黑天鹅女士有急事，你差点都赶不上了。
t_en: Ah, {NICKNAME}! You're finally here! Lady Black Swan has something urgent, and you almost missed her!

t_ch: 你到底是谁？
t_en: Who exactly are you?

t_ch: 你对他们做了什么？
t_en: What did you do to them?

t_ch: 这一切，发生过多少次了？
t_en: How many times has all this happened already?

t_ch: 现在不是开玩笑的时候啦……
t_en: Now's not the time for jokes...

t_ch: 唉…我们原本不必这么「直接」的。
t_en: ...We didn't have to be this "direct."

t_ch: 看来没必要再白费力气了，对吧？
t_en: Guess there's no point in wasting any more effort, right?

t_ch: 你的「记忆」…的确非常特殊，仿佛超脱于时间之外。
t_en: Your "memories" are... truly extraordinary. It's as if they exist beyond the bounds of time itself.

t_ch: 可是，何必把回忆太当真呢？
t_en: But why take memories so seriously?

t_ch: 欢迎，想让光线再暗些吗？
t_en: Welcome. Would you like me to dim the lights more?

t_ch: 别着急，我没有伤害你的同伴，你看见的一切，只在你我之间。
t_en: Don't worry. I haven't harmed your companions. What you've seen stays between us.

t_ch: 你到底是谁？
t_en: Who exactly are you?

t_ch: 如果一点印象都没留下，我倒是会有些受伤呢。
t_en: I'd feel a bit hurt if I didn't leave any impression on you at all.

t_ch: 我的名字是康士坦丝，一名寻常忆者。你若愿意，不妨先委屈一下，和别人一样称呼我为「大丽花」吧。
t_en: My name is Constance. An ordinary Memokeeper. If you'd like, you can do what everyone else does and call me "The Dahlia" for now.

t_ch: 这究竟是哪？
t_en: Just where is this place?

t_ch: 解释起来有些复杂——借助某些方法，我带你走入了自己的「心房」。
t_en: It's a bit complicated to explain. Through certain methods, I've brought you into my own "heart."

t_ch: 任何地方都有可能受人窥视。唯独在这里，我才能放心说一些…只能你知我知的秘密。
t_en: We could be watched if we met anywhere else. This is the only place... where I can feel safe sharing secrets that should stay between us.

t_ch: 容我说声抱歉。我原以为，变成你认知中熟悉的人，可以让许多事更顺利。
t_en: Let me apologize. I thought that becoming someone you are familiar with would make things easier... Or simpler.

t_ch: 你似乎很了解我的过去…
t_en: You seem to know a lot about my past...

t_ch: …许多事？
t_en: ...Things easier?

t_ch: 别着急，这就是我来找你的原因。你所有的疑问，都会得到解答。
t_en: Take it easy. That's exactly why I came to find you. All your questions will be answered.

t_ch: 就从「第一问」开始吧。现在，请你慢慢回过头……
t_en: Let's start with the "First Question." Now, slowly turn around...

t_ch: 见证自己的「死亡」。
t_en: And witness your own "Death".

t_ch: 以这种方式看到自己的尸体，感觉如何？
t_en: How does it feel to see your own corpse like this?

t_ch: 我知道，死亡吓不倒无名客。对你而言，甚至可以说是日常。
t_en: I know death doesn't faze the Nameless. It's practically just another day at the office for you.

t_ch: 所以别担心，这一幕并非现实。它来自一件你无比熟悉的事物……
t_en: So don't worry. This scene isn't real. It comes from something you're all too familiar with...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>这是「剧本」预见的，你在「匹诺康尼」的另一种结局。但在很久以前，它已经被星核猎手阻止。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>This was foreseen by the "script." It's another possible ending for you in Penacony. But it was prevented by the Stellaron Hunters long ago.</color>

t_ch: 没能到来的明日，换言之，就是「不存在的记忆」。
t_en: It's a tomorrow that never came. In other words, it's a "nonexistent memory."

t_ch: 你怎么知道「剧本」？
t_en: How do you know about the "script"?

t_ch: 你似乎对星核猎手很熟悉…
t_en: You seem to know quite a bit about the Stellaron Hunters...

t_ch: 事实上，我也是他们的一员。
t_en: Actually, I'm one of them.

t_ch: 难以置信的神情呢。和其他人一样，我不能透露太多。即使藏身于此，我们也逃不出无处不在的命运。
t_en: That's quite the incredulous look. Like the others, I can't reveal too much. Even if we are hidden in this place, we can't escape from omnipresent destiny.

t_ch: 但我相信，你不会因为一名星核猎手的突然到访而惊讶，对吧？你我本就是这样的存在——星穹列车逐光而行，在身后投下长长的阴影。
t_en: But I trust you won't be surprised by a Stellaron Hunter's sudden visit. After all, that's what our two groups are. The Astral Express travels in pursuit of the light, casting long shadows in its wake.

t_ch: 我来此，只为向你说明一件事：你对「匹诺康尼」的「记忆」并不完整……
t_en: I'm here to tell you only one thing: Your "memory" of Penacony is incomplete.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>其中一部分，已然遭人窃取。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>A part of it has already been stolen.</color>

t_ch: 是谁干的？
t_en: Who did it?

t_ch: 暂时还难以断言。但这件事的严重性倒是很清楚——也许，有人让你遗忘了无比重要的信息。
t_en: That's hard to say for now, but the gravity of the situation is clear. Someone might have made you forget some critically important information.

t_ch: 无论如何，我必须帮你找回——有关「终末」的一切。
t_en: Either way, I must help you recover... everything about the Finality.

t_ch: 我的记忆很完整。
t_en: My memories are completely intact.

t_ch: 这不足为奇，你饲养过性情温顺的宠物吗？它们总能猜到你的心思，主动地讨好你……
t_en: It's not surprising. Have you ever kept a gentle pet? They can always guess what's on your mind, always actively trying to please you...

t_ch: 在我看来，记忆也一样。一旦发觉哪里出现空白，它自己就会小心翼翼地进行填补，无论你是否需要。
t_en: Memories work the same way if you ask me. Once your brain discovers a void in your memories, it'll carefully fill in the gap on its own, whether you need it or not.

t_ch: 我会履行承诺：唤醒你的「记忆」，从而拯救银河的未来。
t_en: I will keep my promise. I will awaken your "memories" and save the cosmos's future.

t_ch: 或许，我也能借机走进你的过去——在我看来，这会十分有趣。
t_en: Perhaps I can also take this chance to peek into your past... which, if you ask me, should be quite interesting.

t_ch: 放心，我不会做什么出格的事，只是…公事公办？
t_en: Don't worry. I won't do anything inappropriate. It's just... strictly business?

t_ch: 就允许我稍加触碰吧，这是我摸索记忆的唯一手段。
t_en: Please, let me touch you a little bit. It's the only way I can probe through memories.

t_ch: 要想将遗忘的「记忆」重新找回，需要一些温和的刺激。所以，你得做好心理准备。
t_en: You'll need some gentle stimulation to recover your forgotten "memories." So, brace yourself.

t_ch: 现在，让我们回到一切的最初，看看究竟是哪里出了问题。
t_en: Let us now go back to where it all began and see what exactly went wrong.

t_ch: 慢慢来，别被记忆淹没，也别担心迷失，记住我的声音，记住此刻的触感，这会将你重新带回我的面前——
t_en: Take it slow. Don't let the memories overwhelm you, and don't worry about getting lost. Remember my voice. Remember the touch you feel at this moment... it will guide you back to me.

t_ch: 那么，你看到了什么？
t_en: So... what did you see?

t_ch: 看来不太愉快，别怕…刚开始的时候，混乱是常态。
t_en: Seems like a rough start. Don't worry... chaos is pretty normal in the beginning.

t_ch: 你还能想起那段旅程的开端吗？「梦想之地」匹诺康尼，位于忆质充盈的阿斯德纳星系。
t_en: Can you still remember where this journey began? Penacony, the Land of the Dreams, located in the memoria-rich Asdana star system.

t_ch: 彼时，一场「同谐」的盛会即将开幕。而一封邀请函，恰好寄到了你们的手中——
t_en: At that time, a grand celebration of the Harmony was about to begin. And as fate would have it, an invitation found its way into your hands...

t_ch: 「诚邀*家族的贵客*莅临匹诺康尼，与其他来宾一道，参加盛大的欢宴。」
t_en: "The Family's esteemed guests are cordially invited to Penacony to participate in our grand celebration."

t_ch: 「将梦中的不可能之事尽收眼底，寻得匹诺康尼之父『钟表匠』的遗产，而后解答：生命因何而沉睡。」
t_en: "Witness the impossible in the realm of dreams, find the Legacy of the Watchmaker, Father of Penacony, and thus the answer to the question: Why does life slumber."

t_ch: 在那里，你遇见了公司干部砂金，他看似只身赴宴，实际上是为收复失地而来。
t_en: There, you encountered Aventurine, an IPC executive who appeared to be answering the invitation alone, but was actually there to reclaim lost territory.

t_ch: 他想方设法寻求盟友，试着以一人之力，撼动家族的天平。
t_en: He desperately sought allies, attempting to tip The Family's scales with himself alone.

t_ch: 以及，前橡木家主，星期日。他是「秩序」的命途行者，将在不久后，篡夺齐响诗班的伟力，与你们为敌。
t_en: And then there was Sunday, the former head of the Oak Family. A Pathstrider of the Order, who would soon usurp the power of the Harmonious Choir and become your enemy.

t_ch: 还有他的妹妹，无人不知的知更鸟。她本应登台献唱，却被卷入一连串的意外，直到最后，也像局外人那般不知所措。
t_en: There was also his sister, the renowned Robin. She was meant to perform on stage, but got caught up in a series of unfortunate events, and in the end, found herself as lost as any bystander.

t_ch: 哎呀，从一开始，你的记忆就出现「缺失」了么？这可有些麻烦，该从哪里着手呢……
t_en: Oh my. Have there been "gaps" in your memories from the very beginning? This is quite troublesome. Where should we begin...

t_ch: 对了，就从「她」开始吧。你一定还记得——
t_en: Ah right, let's start with "her." You must remember...

t_ch: 那自称艺者，被家族追捕的少女。当然，她的身份已经不再是秘密。
t_en: That girl who called herself an artist and was hunted down by The Family. Of course, her true identity is no longer a secret.

t_ch: 你眼中的「初遇」，却是她渴盼已久的「重逢」。不妨从这里开篇……
t_en: What you see as a "first encounter" is actually a long-awaited "reunion" for her. Let's begin our story here...

t_ch: 想起那无法入梦，也不愿醒来的少女……
t_en: Think of that girl who could neither enter dreams, nor wished to wake...

t_ch: 为何，与你一同沉睡？
t_en: Why did she slumber with you?

t_ch: 说来，很久没和老日一起聊聊了，去看看他在干什么吧。
t_en: Come to think of it, I haven't chatted with Sunny in ages. Let's go see what he's up to.

t_ch: 「这…就是梦？」
t_en: "Is this... what dreams are?"

t_ch: 「什么也看不见。什么也听不见。除了黑暗，一无所有。」
t_en: "I can't see anything. Can't hear anything. Nothing exists except darkness."

t_ch: 「我不理解……」
t_en: "I don't understand..."

t_ch: 「为何，人们会留恋这片黑暗？」
t_en: "Why do people long for this darkness?"

t_ch: 先别乱动，会疼得厉害。
t_en: Don't move yet. It's going to hurt real bad.

t_ch: 手术…结束了吗？
t_en: Is the surgery... over?

t_ch: 是啊，和预期一样，你没法恢复「做梦」的机能。
t_en: Yeah. As expected, you can't recover the "ability to dream."

t_ch: 就算付出了这么多代价，机会也只有一次。
t_en: Even after paying such a heavy price, we only get one shot at this.

t_ch: 没关系。一次…就足够了。
t_en: It's fine. One chance... is all I need.

t_ch: 还需要我做什么吗？
t_en: Is there anything else I need to do?

t_ch: 别死就行。
t_en: Just don't die.

t_ch: 喘口气。等调试结束，我就让你正式「入梦」。
t_en: Take a breather. Once the calibration is done, I'll let you officially "enter the dream."

t_ch: 然后，我就能进入那片{RUBY_B#匹诺康尼}「梦想之地」{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: And then, I'll be able to enter that {RUBY_B#Penacony}Land of the Dreams{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 别抱太大希望，那只是个外号。你的梦想不一定能实现。
t_en: Don't get your hopes up. It's just a nickname. Your dream might not come true.

t_ch: …我一直在等今天。
t_en: ...I've been waiting for this day.

t_ch: 人们总是这样形容它：一旦醒来，就消失得无影无踪，所以美梦才那么珍贵。
t_en: People always describe it this way: once you wake up, it vanishes without a trace. That's why sweet dreams are so precious.

t_ch: 听起来只是自我安慰。
t_en: Sounds like you're just trying to make yourself feel better.

t_ch: 或许吧。但是……
t_en: Maybe. But...

t_ch: 「当再次邂逅的那天到来，我想…我会假装我们素未谋面，再重新认识你一次，让一切都从头开始。」
t_en: "When the day we cross paths again arrives, I think... I'll pretend we've never met, and get to know you anew, as if starting all over."

t_ch: 我和{F#她}{M#他}有约定。重逢就在眼前。我没有理由不尽力而为。
t_en: I made a promise with {M#him.}{F#her.} Our reunion is right before us. I have no reason not to give it my all.

t_ch: 就算{F#她}{M#他}早已忘记？
t_en: Even if {F#s}he's already forgotten it?

t_ch: 但我不会忘记。
t_en: But I won't forget.

t_ch: 无论这个故事会如何结束，我都要让它…笑着开始。
t_en: No matter how this story ends, I want it to... begin with a smile.

t_ch: 在艾利欧预见的「未来」里，我们不曾拥有「结局」。但我还有机会，从命运手中……
t_en: In the "future" that Elio foresaw, we never had an "ending". But I still have the chance...

t_ch: 夺回「开启」的权利。
t_en: To wrestle back from fate the right to have a "beginning."

t_ch: 在想什么呢？
t_en: Thinking hard over there?

t_ch: 只是发了会儿呆。
t_en: Just spacing out for a while.

t_ch: 第一次「做梦」，还有些不习惯。感觉这里和现实没什么不同。
t_en: This is my first time "dreaming," so it still feels a little odd. Everything here seems just like the real world.

t_ch: 想到自己还躺在维生舱里，就觉得…很神奇。
t_en: It's mind-blowing to think that... I'm actually still lying in a life support pod.

t_ch: …你确定？
t_en: ...Are you sure?

t_ch: 算了，抓紧时间，星穹列车已经到了。
t_en: Never mind. Hurry up. The Astral Express has arrived.

t_ch: 情况如何，能绕开家族的监视吗？
t_en: How's the situation? Can we avoid The Family's surveillance?

t_ch: 身份早就搞定了，但有件麻烦事。边走边讲吧，去准备好的房间。
t_en: ID's already taken care of, but there's a snag. Let's walk and talk. Head to the room I prepped.

t_ch: 这次…应该不会走错了。
t_en: This time... I should be on the right path.

t_ch: 所以，出了什么问题？
t_en: So, what's the problem?

t_ch: 我雇了个帮手，提前混入匹诺康尼打探消息。刚才，她传回了情报——
t_en: I hired a helper to slip into Penacony ahead of time to snoop around. She just sent me some intel...

t_ch: 坏事，在美梦中，家族近乎全知全能。
t_en: There's bad news. The Family is borderline all-knowing and all-powerful in the sweet dream.

t_ch: 这里有「同谐」令使？
t_en: Is there an Emanator of the Harmony here?

t_ch: 未必是个人，也可能是某种现象，说不清楚。
t_en: It's not necessarily because of a person. It could be a phenomenon. Can't say for certain.

t_ch: 反正，跟「剧本」说的一样，不管用什么办法潜入，你一定会被发现。
t_en: Anyway, just like the "script" says: no matter how you sneak in, you'll be found out.

t_ch: 没有空隙吗？几秒就行。
t_en: There's not even a single gap? Even just for a couple of seconds?

t_ch: 不是不能创造，但问题在于，你太强了。
t_en: It's not that we can't create one. The problem is that you're too powerful.

t_ch: 可不是什么小鱼小虾——在匹诺康尼，你算得上天大的威胁，即便只是尝试入梦，也会立刻被察觉。
t_en: You're no small fry. Here in Penacony, you're a colossal threat. They'll be on to you even if you just try to enter the dream.

t_ch: 那意味着，就算潜入成功，我也不可能摆脱家族的追捕。
t_en: That means even if I manage to sneak in, I won't be able to escape The Family's pursuit.

t_ch: 没错。大打出手也没用，这可是人家的地盘，跟送命没区别。
t_en: Exactly. And a brawl won't change a thing. This is their turf. You'd be throwing your life away.

t_ch: 虽然很冒险，但我有一个计划。
t_en: It might be risky, but I have a plan.

t_ch: 家族还没摸清「星核猎手萨姆」的身份，对吧？
t_en: The Family still hasn't figured out who "Stellaron Hunter: SAM" really is, right?

t_ch: 至少分家没可能。
t_en: At least not this branch Family.

t_ch: 不如就利用这一点吧。我会启动「火萤IV型」，突袭「白日梦」酒店。来的路上，我仔细观察过了，常规安保无法拖住我。
t_en: Then let's use that to our advantage. I'll activate Fyrefly Type-IV and attack The Reverie hotel. I studied their defenses on the way here. Their basic security won't be able to keep me in check.

t_ch: 制造一场骚乱，让「萨姆」站到台前。然后，我再以最快的速度回到这里，趁着骚动尚未平息，以「流萤」的身份入梦。
t_en: Create a commotion to force SAM in the spotlight. Then, I'll rush back here at top speed, and while the chaos is still fresh, dive into the dream as Firefly.

t_ch: 风险太高。为了一个不确定的机会，把「萨姆」这张底牌掀开。不划算。
t_en: Too risky. It's not worth it to expose our trump card SAM just for an uncertain gamble.

t_ch: 可我们已经在这里了，总要试试看。
t_en: But we're already here. Might as well give it a shot.

t_ch: 我先推演路线，计算下安保的响应时间……
t_en: Let me extrapolate the route and calculate the security response time...

t_ch: 等等。
t_en: Hold on.

t_ch: 怎么了？
t_en: What is it?

t_ch: 奇怪。我这里显示，安保几乎不存在。跟你说的对不上。
t_en: Weird. My readings show security is practically non-existent. That doesn't match what you told me.

t_ch: 以防万一，描述一下你看到的情景。
t_en: Describe to me what you see, just to be safe.

t_ch: 描述？
t_en: Describe?

t_ch: 只是常规的酒店布置。
t_en: It's just your standard hotel setup.

t_ch: 沙发…入梦池…还有……
t_en: Sofa... Dreampool... and...

t_ch: 什么人？
t_en: Who's there?

t_ch: 别慌，根本没有「人」。果然，你眼里的画面，和我看到的「监控」不太一样。
t_en: Relax. There's "no one" here. I knew it. What you're seeing isn't quite the same as the "surveillance" I see.

t_ch: 怪了，怎么会有这种事，我来修复。
t_en: That is weird. How does that work? Let me fix it.

t_ch: 我就说…你怎么会觉得梦里很普通。现在呢？怎么样了？
t_en: I told you... Dreams are never as simple as they seem. How about now?

t_ch: 这里是……
t_en: This place is...

t_ch: 没换地方，刚才你一直都待在这儿，嘴里说着怪话。
t_en: You haven't gone anywhere. You've been here the whole time, saying weird stuff.

t_ch: 第一次「做梦」，还有些不习惯。感觉这里和现实没什么不同。
t_en: This is my first time "dreaming," so it still feels a little odd. Everything here seems just like the real world.

t_ch: 我还以为你只是嘴硬。
t_en: And here I thought you were just being stubborn.

t_ch: 抱歉，再提醒我一下吧，记忆有些模糊了。
t_en: Sorry, could you jog my memory again? It's a little fuzzy.

t_ch: 按照「剧本」指示，我们搞来了一台废弃的入梦池。费了点功夫，有个公司人非要跟咱们抢。
t_en: Following the "script," we secured a discarded Dreampool. Wasn't easy. Some IPC lackey decided to fight us for it.

t_ch: 公司？
t_en: IPC?

t_ch: 别在意。反正没抢过咱们。
t_en: Forget it. It's not like they won.

t_ch: 我把它改造成了维生舱。这会儿，你我都在阿斯德纳星系边缘飘着呢。
t_en: I converted it into a life support pod. Right now, we're both drifting at the edge of the Asdana system.

t_ch: 原来如此，利用联觉梦境。但看起来，我没能进入真正的匹诺康尼？
t_en: I see. We're using the Synesthesia Dreamscape. But it seems I haven't made it into the real Penacony?

t_ch: 反正这风景怎么也和「美梦」搭不上边，可能是某种…「缓冲区」吧。
t_en: This scenery doesn't exactly scream "sweet dream" anyway. It's probably some kind of... "buffer zone" or something.

t_ch: 你刚才看见的景象，多半是一种海市蜃楼。
t_en: What you saw just now was probably a mirage.

t_ch: 这样啊……
t_en: Right...

t_ch: 那突袭酒店的计划也行不通了。
t_en: Then the plan to attack the hotel won't work either.

t_ch: 没错。你现在顶多能突袭我。
t_en: Exactly. The only thing you can attack right now is me.

t_ch: 但这也说明，我还没有暴露，并且距离「十二时刻」只有一步之遥了？
t_en: In other words, I'm still in the clear... and I'm just one step away from the Twelve Hours?

t_ch: 你总能在坏事堆里找出点好消息。
t_en: You always manage to find a silver lining in a pile of bad news.

t_ch: 至少，现状变得清晰许多了。
t_en: At least things are much clearer now.

t_ch: 我先去别处看看，也许能找到适合「偷渡」的入口。
t_en: Let me take a look elsewhere first. Maybe I'll stumble upon a good entrance to become a "stowaway."

t_ch: 嗯，你先找路。我再去联系下那临时帮手。
t_en: Mm. You scout ahead. I'll get in touch with the temp helper.

t_ch: 你入梦时总归会有点影响，只是掉下来个灯，已经不错了——忆质就这么不稳定，没事，等下我来搞定，不会被发现。
t_en: You entering the dream will definitely cause a ripple or two. Honestly, if all it did was knock down a light, I'd say that's a win. That's how fragile memoria is. Relax, I'll take care of it. No one's going to find out.

t_ch: 果然。但为什么……
t_en: Just as I thought. But why...

t_ch: 不先避避？
t_en: Shouldn't you take cover first?

t_ch: 没必要，我太了解它们了。
t_en: No need. I know them too well.

t_ch: 未必是真正的「繁育」。还记得么？这片星系很久以前，也遇上过虫灾，规模还不小。
t_en: It's not necessarily the real Propagation. This star system went through the Swarm Disaster long ago, remember? And it was anything but small.

t_ch: 你是说，这只是过去的幻影吗？
t_en: Are you saying this is just an echo from the past?

t_ch: 最好是。也可能类似迷因，是根植在阿斯德纳人心底的恐惧，跟噩梦似的。
t_en: Ideally, yes. But it might also be more like a meme: A fear buried in the Asdanians' hearts like a nightmare.

t_ch: 所以，这片梦境果然不在家族掌控中。
t_en: So, this Dreamscape really isn't under The Family's control.

t_ch: 没准你是对的。沿着这条路继续找下去吧。至于它们究竟是什么……
t_en: Maybe you're right. Let's keep searching down this path. As for what they really are...

t_ch: 让我试一试就知道了。
t_en: Let me try it out, then we'll know.

t_ch: 遗骸消失了。果然只是忆质形成的幻影吗？
t_en: The remains are gone. Was it just an illusion formed by memoria after all?

t_ch: 没跑了，难怪报废的入梦池不值钱。没有家族保护，普通人贸然来到这里，可有够受的了。
t_en: Figures. No wonder a scrapped Dreampool isn't worth a dime. Without The Family's protection, any regular visitor here is just begging for trouble.

t_ch: 等下还是当心点吧，未必所有幻影都是善茬。
t_en: Better stay on guard. Not every illusion has good intentions.

t_ch: 我会的。
t_en: Got it.

t_ch: 还有，其实绕开它们也可以的。
t_en: Also, you can actually just go around them.

t_ch: 没必要非得搭理虫子，这是你的坏习惯。
t_en: No one said you have to pay attention to the bugs. That's your bad habit.

t_ch: 抱歉，我没办法说服自己视而不见。
t_en: Sorry. I just can't bring myself to look the other way.

t_ch: 算了，大家都一样。明知不会有用，却总想为过去做点什么。
t_en: Never mind. Everyone's the same. They all try to do something for the past, even when they know it's futile.

t_ch: 只要能好受些，都由你——动作利落点就行。
t_en: If it makes you feel better, I'll leave it to you. Just be quick about it.

t_ch: 谢谢。
t_en: Thank you.

t_ch: 喔，帮手回话了。你先去大厅，她会派人接应你。
t_en: Oh, got a response from our helper. Head to the main lobby. She'll send someone to meet you.

t_ch: 但多留几个心眼。那家伙是个假面愚者，指不定……
t_en: But watch your back. That one's a Masked Fool. Who knows what they might...

t_ch: 怎么了？
t_en: Hello?

t_ch: 信号中断了…？
t_en: The signal's gone...

t_ch: 又来了吗……嗯？
t_en: Here we go again... Hmm?
...Hmm?

t_ch: 机甲无法启动？为什么……
t_en: The mech won't start? Why...

t_ch: 没有袭击我。它们…是在「逃亡」吗？
t_en: They didn't attack me. Are they... "running away"?

t_ch: 这条走廊尽头，究竟是……
t_en: What lies at the end of this corridor...

t_ch: （遍地都是残骸，可它们不是幻影吗？难道……）
t_en: (Debris everywhere... but weren't they just illusions? Could it be...)

t_ch: （除我以外，还有人在这里。）
t_en: (That there's someone else here besides me.)

t_ch: （真蛰虫死于高热反应，而且这道伤痕……）
t_en: (The True Sting died from a high heat reaction, and this scar...)

t_ch: （怎么会……）
t_en: (How can this be...)

t_ch: （我…再熟悉不过。）
t_en: (I... know it all too well.)

t_ch: （虫群也就算了，可就算是忆质。）
t_en: (The Swarm is one thing, but even for memoria...)

t_ch: （匹诺康尼，为何会出现「格拉默铁骑」？）
t_en: (Why would Glamoth's Iron Cavalry appear in Penacony?)

t_ch: 「下一片战场，希望能看见星星。」
t_en: "I hope we can see stars on the next battlefield."

t_ch: 「我们还会再见面吗？」
t_en: "Will we see each other again?"

t_ch: 「那我们……」
t_en: "Then we..."

t_ch: 「应该能认出对方吧。」
t_en: "Should be able to find each other."

t_ch: AR…<unbreak>214</unbreak>……
t_en: AR... <unbreak>214</unbreak>...

t_ch: 这…就是梦？
t_en: Is this... what dreams are?

t_ch: 这片噩梦…是「你」的记忆？
t_en: Is this nightmare... "your" memory?

t_ch: 好啦——虽然不合时宜，但初次尝试，只能先到这里了。
t_en: Alright. Not the best timing, but that's as far as this first try goes.

t_ch: 怎么样，有什么不舒服的地方吗？
t_en: So, how are you feeling? Any discomfort?

t_ch: 这是流萤的记忆？
t_en: Is this Firefly's memory?

t_ch: 严格来说，是我的记忆。我不能擅自代表他人。
t_en: Strictly speaking, these are my memories. I can't presume to speak for others.

t_ch: 什么时候的事？
t_en: When did this happen?

t_ch: 那时，你刚刚抵达匹诺康尼，正在酒店办理入住。
t_en: You had just arrived in Penacony at that time and were checking in at the hotel.

t_ch: 为什么要打断我？
t_en: Why did you stop me?

t_ch: 如今的你，应当知晓「记忆」珍贵又危险。我必须非常小心，才能让过去一点一滴浮出水面。
t_en: By now, you should know that "memories" are both precious and dangerous. I must be extremely careful in allowing all the details of the past to come to the surface.

t_ch: 如果海量回忆一同涌现，你会难以承受。
t_en: If too many memories come flooding back at once, it would be too much for you to bear.

t_ch: 可我还是没想起来…
t_en: But I still can't recall...

t_ch: 告诉我流萤的后续。
t_en: Tell me what happened to Firefly.

t_ch: 恕我不能亲口告诉你。如果用言语复述，无论是否有意，都会为回忆平添不实。
t_en: I'm afraid I can't tell you directly. Whether intentional or not, putting memories into words would only distort them.

t_ch: 放轻松。尘埃正在被一一拂去，看——
t_en: Relax... The dust is being swept aside, speck by speck. Look...

t_ch: 尽管其中一部分遭人窃取，但「匹诺康尼」的记忆，已再度清晰起来。
t_en: Though part of it was stolen, the memory of Penacony has become clear again.

t_ch: 你刚才看见的，是属于她的「开端」。这场美梦分成两条平行的道路——你行于的，名为「开拓」；她行于的，名为「终末」。
t_en: What you just witnessed was her "beginning." This dream diverges into two parallel paths: Yours, named the Trailblaze. And hers, named the Finality.

t_ch: 这两条路终会相交，为了抵达那一刻，我们要找出更多…记忆的矛盾之处。
t_en: These two paths will eventually intersect, and to reach that moment, we must find more... contradictions in the memories.

t_ch: 还记得她吧——无人不知的知更鸟，在现实酒店，你们早早相遇。
t_en: You still remember her, don't you? Robin, known by all... You encountered her early on at the hotel in reality.

t_ch: 在你入梦后，也是她使用「同谐」的力量，帮助你适应美梦。只是，自那场告别后——
t_en: After you entered the dream, she was using the Harmony's powers to help you adjust to the sweet dream. It's just that... after your farewell...

t_ch: 再相见时，她已成了一场阴谋的受害者。
t_en: She had already become a victim of a sinister plot when you saw her again.

t_ch: 两点之间，她究竟发现了什么，才会遭受如此可怕的命运？
t_en: What did she discover during that time that would make her suffer such a terrible fate?

t_ch: 小心，这一次，我们要更加深入……
t_en: Be careful. This time, we're going to dig deeper...

t_ch: 与你的「记忆」…全然不符的过去。
t_en: Into a past... utterly at odds with the "memories" you hold.

t_ch: 银狼，你听到什么声音了吗？
t_en: Silver Wolf? Did you hear something?

t_ch: 没注意，忆域里有些怪动静很正常，听说，很多回忆会一直重演。
t_en: I didn't notice anything. Strange disturbances in the Memory Zone are nothing unusual. They say... many memories of the past will replay over and over again.

t_ch: 不对…这声音，我绝对不会认错……
t_en: No... Wait. I'd recognize that sound anywhere...

t_ch: 太过弱小了，和现实中完全不同。
t_en: Way too weak. Nothing like in real life.

t_ch: 不过，能经历过去的记忆，有时也不算坏事吧？
t_en: But reliving old memories isn't always such a bad thing, is it?

t_ch: 看得出来，这趟出差——你心情不错。
t_en: Looks like this "business trip" has put you in good spirits.

t_ch: 按照银狼所说来到了房间附近……
t_en: You follow Silver Wolf's instructions and arrive near the room...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}！你没事吧？
t_en: {NICKNAME}! Are you alright?

t_ch: 意外地没什么感觉……
t_en: Surprisingly, I don't feel anything...

t_ch: 呵呵，毕竟这里是「梦境」嘛。
t_en: Hehe, well you are in the Dreamscape, after all.

t_ch: 看来这位客人还不习惯从现实到梦境的变化啊。别担心，这种「失重」在初入梦境的旅客间很常见。
t_en: Seems like our guest here hasn't gotten used to the transition. Fret not, feeling a sense of weightlessness is normal for new visitors.

t_ch: 知更鸟，请你帮助我们的朋友更好地适应这场美梦吧。
t_en: Robin, please guide our friend in getting more comfortable with the new environment.

t_ch: …知更鸟？
t_en: ...Robin?

t_ch: 啊…交给我吧。
t_en: Ah... leave it to me.

t_ch: 没事的，放轻松，很快就会过去。
t_en: Don't worry, just relax. You'll be feeling like your normal self in no time.

t_ch: （话虽如此……）
t_en: (Even so...)

t_ch: （「调律」依然力不从心……）
t_en: (Tuning is still beyond me...)

t_ch: 别担心，继续吧，我会帮你的。
t_en: Don't worry, keep going, I'll help you.

t_ch: 可是哥哥，这……
t_en: But brother, this...

t_ch: 你对我做了什么？
t_en: What did you do to me?

t_ch: 别担心。她只是利用「同谐」的共鸣对你进行了调律，以便你能更自如地在梦境中掌控自己的身体。
t_en: Relax. Just did some tuning on you with the resonance of the Harmony to allow you to control your limbs freely in the Dreamscape.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼的美梦本质上是由「忆质」构成的世界。只有掌握它的性质，你才能在其中自由行动。
t_en: Essentially, the dream of Penacony is a world formed by memoria. Only by fully understanding its nature can you move freely within it.

t_ch: 除了流光忆庭的忆者，一般人很难随心所欲地操纵忆质。但没关系，在「同谐」的调律下——基本上，你可以依赖现实的物理法则理解梦中世界。
t_en: Unless you're one of the Memokeepers of the Garden of Recollection, it can be difficult at first to manipulate the memoria as you wish. But once you've been tuned by the Harmony, you can use the same laws of physics from the real world to understand how the dream world works.

t_ch: 哎呀…你瞧我，职业病又犯了。我总是改不掉这好为人师的毛病。
t_en: Oops... I've fallen into my professional habits again. I just can't seem to shake off this urge to be a know-it-all.

t_ch: 别在意，他从来都是这样。请好好享受家族为各位打造的美梦乐园吧，我们就先失陪了。祝你玩得开心！
t_en: Don't mind him. He's always like that. Please enjoy the beautiful dreamscape The Family has built for everyone. We shall take our leave. Have a blast!

t_ch: 抱歉，哥哥，我……
t_en: Sorry, brother, I...

t_ch: 该道歉的人是我。明知道你状态不佳，还提出这种过分的要求。
t_en: I'm the one who should apologize. I knew you weren't feeling well, yet I made such an unreasonable request.

t_ch: 我早该料到，失声只是表象，真正的问题出在「同谐」，对吗？
t_en: I should have known. Losing your voice was just the tip of the iceberg. The real problem lies with the Harmony, doesn't it?

t_ch: 果然，你也看出来了。
t_en: Just as I thought... you figured it out too.

t_ch: 你那封信，我一直带在身上——
t_en: Your letter... I've kept it with me all this time...

t_ch: 别担心，事关重大，大典开幕前，我定会查明真相。
t_en: Don't worry. This is crucial. I'll uncover the truth before the festival begins.

t_ch: 偶尔也让我为你分担一些吧。匹诺康尼…是不是出事了？
t_en: Let me help you shoulder some of the burden. Did something happen in Penacony?

t_ch: …谐乐大典将至，宾客鱼龙混杂，{RUBY_B#「梦主」}歌斐木先生{RUBY_E#}必须全心投入筹备，无暇他顾。
t_en: ...The Charmony Festival is approaching, and with all sorts of guests mingling, {RUBY_B#Dreammaster}Mr. Gopher Wood{RUBY_E#} must focus entirely on the preparations, leaving no attention for other matters.

t_ch: 这给了一些人可乘之机。倘若家族真有叛徒，现在就是行动的最佳时机。
t_en: This creates an opening for some people to exploit. If there really is a traitor in The Family, now would be the perfect time to make their move.

t_ch: 听说「梦主」抱恙在身。我回来后，还一次都没见过他……
t_en: I heard the Dreammaster has fallen ill. Since I came back, I haven't seen him even once...

t_ch: 不久前，发生了一场意外。他病得很重，短时间内，恐怕无法以人形现身了。
t_en: There was an accident not long ago. He's gravely ill, and I'm afraid he won't be able to appear in his humanoid form for a while.

t_ch: 所以，我们更要替先生分忧。追查一事就交给我，你什么都不用想，只需专注于舞台。
t_en: That's why we need to help him even more. Leave the investigation to me. You don't have to worry about anything else, just focus on the stage.

t_ch: 可是……
t_en: But...

t_ch: 没有可是。听着，知更鸟——切勿和梦中的「死亡」扯上关系。
t_en: No buts. Listen, Robin. Never get involved with "Death" in dreams.

t_ch: 你要放声歌唱。我向你保证，等到开幕时，不会有任何杂音掩盖你的光芒。
t_en: You need to sing your heart out. I promise you, when the curtain rises, no noise will drown out your brilliance.

t_ch: 即便是「同谐」自身的影子，也不行。
t_en: Not even the shadow of Harmony itself.

t_ch: 也对。从小到大，没有什么事是哥哥办不到的。
t_en: That's true. Ever since we were kids, there's nothing my big brother couldn't handle.

t_ch: 那我就去准备啦？不占用你的时间了。
t_en: Then I'll go get ready? I won't take up any more of your time.

t_ch: 多加小心，哥哥。记得给自己留个好位置。
t_en: Be careful, brother. And don't forget to save a good spot for yourself.

t_ch: 当然。我不介意为此徇私。
t_en: Of course. Who says I can't play favorites once in a while?

t_ch: 回头见。
t_en: See you later.

t_ch: 哥哥，总是这样言不由衷啊。
t_en: Big brother, you're always hiding your true feelings like this.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>装作无事发生，但我在朝露公馆看见…你明明已经焦头烂额了。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>You're acting like everything's fine, but I saw you at Dewlight Pavilion... You were clearly at your wit's end.</color>

t_ch: 写那封信时，我还能勉强进行「调律」，可后来，情况却越来越糟……
t_en: When I wrote that letter, I could still barely manage to "tune," but later, things just kept getting worse...

t_ch: 直觉告诉我，一定是*梦境*出现了什么问题。
t_en: My intuition tells me that something must be wrong with the dreamscape.

t_ch: 以我现在的状态，不知能否感知到异常……
t_en: In my current state, I'm wondering if I can even sense any anomalies...

t_ch: 尽力而为吧。但愿，这只是虚惊一场。
t_en: I'll do my best. Let's hope this is just a false alarm.

t_ch: 是…她？
t_en: Is that... her?

t_ch: 别想跑！你这个偷渡犯！
t_en: Don't even think about running away, you stowaway!

t_ch: 不、不好意思！请帮帮我……
t_en: S—Sorry for bothering you! Please, I need your help...

t_ch: 怎么了，我来帮你。保护美少女我义不容辞！
t_en: What's wrong? I'll help you. I can't possibly ignore a beautiful lady in trouble!

t_ch: 伙计们，她还有共犯！
t_en: Hey, look! She has an accomplice!

t_ch: 正好！给我一起拿下！
t_en: Good work! Now we can nab them both in one go!

t_ch: 偷渡犯？
t_en: Stowaway?

t_ch: 看来不是偶然，猎犬也和我一样，捕捉到了那一丝杂音。
t_en: Seems it wasn't a coincidence. The Bloodhound picked up that strange noise too, just like I did.

t_ch: 还是…先不出面了。如果那女孩真是外来者，对我而言，这是个机会。
t_en: Better to... stay out of sight for now. If that girl really is an outsider, this could be my chance.

t_ch: 行了行了，小子们——到此为止。
t_en: That's enough, boys.

t_ch: 长、长官？
t_en: S—Sir?

t_ch: 你们是怎么办事儿的？睁大眼睛瞧瞧，这姑娘是我们要找的偷渡犯吗？
t_en: What's gotten into you all? Open your eyes and take a good look. Is this lady the stowaway we're looking for?

t_ch: 咦，这…这人是谁？
t_en: Eh? Who... Who's this?

t_ch: 你不知道么？棕色头发、灰马甲——这位就是家族派来看护谐乐大典的治安官啊。
t_en: Don't you know him? Look at his brown hair and gray vest. He's the officer sent here by The Family to maintain order at the Charmony Festival.

t_ch: 原、原来如此…报告长官，我们正在捉拿偷渡犯——就是这个小姑娘，可疑得很，一定是她！
t_en: I—I see... Sir, the thing is, we're trying to apprehend a stowaway, and that young lady there looks very suspicious. We're sure she's the one!

t_ch: 放屁。你们再好好看看？目击报告说是个银色的家伙，你们给我抓银色头发的小姑娘？能是一回事儿吗？还和客人打上架了？！
t_en: That's nonsense. Take another look, will you? The witness report says that the suspect is a lad with silver hair, and you guys are going after a girl with silver hair. Does that even make sense? She's our guest!

t_ch: 行了，滚吧。让我来处理。
t_en: Well, just get out of my way and I'll take care of this.

t_ch: 遵命！
t_en: Yes, sir!

t_ch: 不对劲。
t_en: Something's off.

t_ch: 他…没有说谎。可为什么？猎犬家系的治安官，不应该察觉不到异常。
t_en: He's... not lying. But why? An officer from the Bloodhound Family shouldn't fail to sense something is amiss.

t_ch: 放心吧，小姐。我相信这是一场误会，这么可爱的女孩怎么会是偷渡犯呢。
t_en: Don't worry. I believe this is just a misunderstanding. How could such a lovely girl like you be a stowaway?

t_ch: …谢谢。如果没有您出手相助，我真的不知道该怎么办了。
t_en: ...Thanks. Without your kind help, I wouldn't know what to do.

t_ch: 小意思。
t_en: Just part of the job.

t_ch: 我还有事，先告辞了。如果你们有需要，就找附近的幼犬联络我吧。祝你们享受这场美梦。
t_en: I need to get going. If you need help, you can reach out to me through the young Bloodhounds in this area. I wish you an enjoyable experience in this land of dreams.

t_ch: 认识我的人太多，直接跟上去恐怕不合适。
t_en: Too many people know me. It wouldn't be wise to follow them so openly.

t_ch: 看来，只能使用一些手段了。
t_en: Looks like I'll have to use a few methods of my own.

t_ch: 希望我还有余力做到……
t_en: I hope I still have the strength to do this...

t_ch: 虽然被猎犬家系的人当成了偷渡犯，但我其实是本地人哦——鸢尾花家系的艺者「流萤」！尽管只是临时演员……
t_en: Although the Bloodhounds mistook me for a stowaway, I'm actually a local. My name is Firefly, and I'm from the Iris Family. I work as a stage performer, although right now I'm just an extra...

t_ch: 成功了！万幸，没有被发觉……
t_en: Success! Thank goodness, I wasn't discovered...

t_ch: 那女孩…自称鸢尾花家系的艺者？可她的声音里，我听不见共鸣……
t_en: That girl... claims to be an artist from the Iris Family? But I can't hear any resonance in her voice...

t_ch: …不说这个了！我带你去游览城镇…我们走吧！
t_en: ...We can talk about that another time! Right now, I wanna give you a tour of the town... Here we go!

t_ch: 得小心些，不能被人发现。
t_en: Be careful. Can't let anyone find me.

t_ch: 考虑到你是第一次来，不如就从最简单的开始吧，美梦排排乐和幸运转盘都很容易上手哦。
t_en: Since this is your first time here, I say we start with the easiest games. The Dreamy Slots and Lucky Wheel are pretty straightforward.

t_ch: 只是…来玩游戏的吗？
t_en: Just here... to play games?

t_ch: 看来是我多虑了。抱歉，{NICKNAME}…还有流萤小姐。也许这只是一段美好的相遇，仅此而已。
t_en: I guess I was worried for nothing. Sorry, {NICKNAME}... and Miss Firefly. Maybe this was just a beautiful encounter, nothing more.

t_ch: 我还是离开梦境看看吧，不知回到现实中，情况会不会好转……
t_en: I should leave the dreamscape and see the sights beyond it... Maybe things will be better in the real world...

t_ch: 时间不多了吗？
t_en: Running out of time?
Huh...?

t_ch: {F#她们}{M#他们}分开了？
t_en: They split up?

t_ch: 该入场的人都齐了。不是我扫兴，但提醒一句……
t_en: Everyone who needs to be here is here. Not to be a buzzkill, but just a reminder...

t_ch: 别忘了你的「第一次死亡」。
t_en: Don't forget about your "First Death."

t_ch: 她在和谁说话？「死亡」又是……
t_en: Who's she talking to? And what's this about "Death"...

t_ch: 嘘…现在别聊这个。
t_en: Shh... let's not talk about this right now.
